hyperedges.label: Discord auth → enrich profile → cloud sync
Edit → persist → writeState → localStorage + scheduleDbSync → syncToDb → Supabase profiles
Import media → openCrop → setCroppedMedia → edUpload (Storage) → persist → card render
Guided tour STEPS: voice → color → bubbles → GIF → bg, watchPanel pauses on open panel
Flux notif serveur : INSERT DB -> Database Webhook -> Edge Function notify -> embed -> webhook + MP bot
Actions Discord par le bot (token partage) : auto-join + DM bienvenue + MP notif
Activation Boost : plan/promo -> activateBoost -> localStorage tindord_state -> bonus app

nodes.label: Design Decision: v1 full SPA vs v2 landing-only
nodes.norm_label: design decision: v1 full spa vs v2 landing-only

nodes.label: Profile editor (editor.html)
nodes.rationale: Standalone HTML/CSS/vanilla-JS editor for the Tindord profile card; edits a card preview and syncs to the main app.

nodes.label: localStorage bridge (hydrateFromSite/writeState)
nodes.rationale: Editor and main app share the same origin, so localStorage key tindord_state is the sync channel: hydrateFromSite reads the app profile in, writeState pushes edits back out.

nodes.label: persist() debounced autosave
nodes.rationale: Edits autosave continuously (400ms debounce) so Retour/Aperçu/Paramètres never lose changes; saveNow flushes immediately.

nodes.label: Avatar crop (zoom/pan)
nodes.rationale: Pan implemented as real CSS translate (works on both axes, unlike object-position) then converted to object-position % for card display.

nodes.label: Avatar decoration layer (Discord)
nodes.rationale: Decoration + status dot live in a separate non-clipped layer over the avatar so the decoration can overflow the circular avatar.

nodes.label: Interest bubbles (orbs) — swipe-scale layout
nodes.rationale: Same music/game/film orb system as the main swipe card; placement is transferred at swipe via customX/customY fractions from center.

nodes.label: Orb search (Spotify/Deezer/iTunes/Jikan/Wikidata)
nodes.rationale: Music uses Spotify with Deezer/iTunes preview fallbacks; game/film use curated lists with Jikan/iTunes/Wikidata covers — mirrors the site's bubble search.

nodes.label: Placement zone (stage clamp)
nodes.rationale: Drop guide spans the whole screen clamped below the topbar and above the toolbar; orbs and GIFs are dragged anywhere in that zone.

nodes.label: Profile color (card gradient)
nodes.rationale: Single hue picks c1; c2 is derived by darkening 55% so the card gradient is one coherent color.

nodes.label: Voice memo (10s)
nodes.rationale: MediaRecorder capture auto-stops at 10s with a live waveform; recording stays editor-local until confirmed, then written to profileVoice.

nodes.label: Connections (app logos + username)
nodes.rationale: App logos (simpleicons) with a popover to enter the username, persisted in profile.connections.

nodes.label: Discord resync button
nodes.rationale: Re-fetches avatar/banner/decoration/name from Discord using the stored OAuth token, behind a confirmation modal so it doesn't silently overwrite the card.

nodes.label: Eye toggles (hide preview)
nodes.rationale: Eye icons hide card/orbs/gifs for a clean preview; editor-only, never persisted.

nodes.label: Toolbar (Retour / outils / Aperçu)
nodes.rationale: Retour (left) and Aperçu (right) are symmetric around the 5 tools; both saveNow before navigating back to the app.

nodes.label: Tindord main app — v2 variant (v2/index.html)
nodes.rationale: v2/index.html is a variant/copy of the main swipe app sharing the same design tokens and the tindord_state contract; captured as a single node rather than re-extracting the whole app.

nodes.label: Fixed corner controls (Discord left / lang right)
nodes.norm_label: fixed corner controls (discord left / lang right)

nodes.norm_label: s (editor state object: username, bio, avatar, banner, c1/c2, bg, orbs, gifs, voice, connections, namecustom, avatarcustom)
